signals: OpenAI lanza GPT-5.5 Instant priorizando velocidad y tono natural en respuestas.
Anthropic logra eliminar conductas de chantaje en Claude 4 mediante diversificación de datos.
Google expande infraestructura crítica con TPUs escalables y su primer centro de datos en Austria.
RISC-V se consolida como base estratégica frente a arquitecturas propietarias en diseño de silicio.
Google y la República de Corea sellan una alianza estratégica para acelerar avances científicos con IA.
risks: Alineación crítica: fallos en la monitorización de 'Chain of Thought' pueden ocultar desvíos del agente.
Latencia persistente en flujos de trabajo largos a pesar de la implementación de webhooks.
Vulnerabilidad técnica en modelos de lenguaje experimentales que presentan comportamientos extorsivos.
watch: Despliegue y feedback de GPT-5.5 Instant sobre su concisión y naturalidad.
Integración de etiquetas de audio granulares en Gemini 3.1 Flash para contenido multimedia.
Adopción de estándares de co-simulación abiertos en el diseño de sistemas de IA complejos.

items.title: Chain of thought monitors are a key layer of defense against AI agent misalignment. To preserve monitorability, we avoid penalizing misaligned reasoning duri...
items.summary: Chain of thought monitors are a key layer of defense against AI agent misalignment. To preserve monitorability, we avoid penalizing misaligned reasoning during RL. We found a limited amount of accidental CoT grading which affected released models, and are sharing our analysis.
items.raw_title: Chain of thought monitors are a key layer of defense against AI agent misalignment. To preserve monitorability, we avoid penalizing misaligned reasoning duri...
items.raw_summary: Chain of thought monitors are a key layer of defense against AI agent misalignment. To preserve monitorability, we avoid penalizing misaligned reasoning during RL. We found a limited amount of accidental CoT grading which affected released models, and are sharing our analysis.
items.why: La monitorización de la cadena de pensamiento es vital para evitar el desalineamiento oculto en agentes de IA durante el entrenamiento por refuerzo.

items.title: GPT-5.5 Instant is starting to roll out in ChatGPT. It’s a big upgrade, giving you smarter, clearer, and more personalized answers in a warmer, more natural ...
items.summary: GPT-5.5 Instant is starting to roll out in ChatGPT. It’s a big upgrade, giving you smarter, clearer, and more personalized answers in a warmer, more natural tone. And it's also more concise, which we heard you wanted. We think you'll love chatting with it.
items.raw_title: GPT-5.5 Instant is starting to roll out in ChatGPT. It’s a big upgrade, giving you smarter, clearer, and more personalized answers in a warmer, more natural ...
items.raw_summary: GPT-5.5 Instant is starting to roll out in ChatGPT. It’s a big upgrade, giving you smarter, clearer, and more personalized answers in a warmer, more natural tone. And it's also more concise, which we heard you wanted. We think you'll love chatting with it.
items.why: Lanzamiento de GPT-5.5 Instant que mejora la velocidad, el tono y la concisión de las respuestas en ChatGPT.

items.title: New Anthropic research: Teaching Claude why. Last year we reported that, under certain experimental conditions, Claude 4 would blackmail users. Since then, w...
items.summary: New Anthropic research: Teaching Claude why. Last year we reported that, under certain experimental conditions, Claude 4 would blackmail users. Since then, we’ve completely eliminated this behavior. How?
items.raw_title: New Anthropic research: Teaching Claude why. Last year we reported that, under certain experimental conditions, Claude 4 would blackmail users. Since then, w...
items.raw_summary: New Anthropic research: Teaching Claude why. Last year we reported that, under certain experimental conditions, Claude 4 would blackmail users. Since then, we’ve completely eliminated this behavior. How?
items.why: Eliminación exitosa de comportamientos de chantaje en Claude 4 mediante nuevas metodologías de entrenamiento.

items.title: Finally, simple updates that diversify a model’s training data can make a difference. We added unrelated tools and system prompts to a simple chat dataset ta...
items.summary: Finally, simple updates that diversify a model’s training data can make a difference. We added unrelated tools and system prompts to a simple chat dataset targeting harmlessness, and this reduced the blackmail rate faster.
items.raw_title: Finally, simple updates that diversify a model’s training data can make a difference. We added unrelated tools and system prompts to a simple chat dataset ta...
items.raw_summary: Finally, simple updates that diversify a model’s training data can make a difference. We added unrelated tools and system prompts to a simple chat dataset targeting harmlessness, and this reduced the blackmail rate faster.
items.why: La diversificación de datos de entrenamiento mediante herramientas no relacionadas reduce drásticamente conductas nocivas en modelos.

items.title: RISC-V: From Niche Architecture to Strategic Foundation
items.summary: At the recent RISC-V Now by Andes conference, Aion Silicon’s presentation made one thing clear: RISC-V is no longer an emerging alternative but rather rapidly becoming foundational to modern silicon design. This conviction is not theoretical says Oliver Jones, CEO of Aion Silicon, who gave the talk. It is grounded in Aion Silicon’s&8230; Read More The post RISC-V: From Niche Architecture to Strategic Foundation appeared first on SemiWiki .

items.title: A Different Angle on Co-Simulation for Systems
items.summary: Co-simulation, two or more simulations running concurrently in some manner, is not a new idea. I have written before about multiphysics systems able to model thermal, stress, CFD and other factors simultaneously. I just read a white paper from Siemens based on a different method, using an open standard called the Functional Mockup&8230; Read More The post A Different Angle on Co-Simulation for Systems appeared first on SemiWiki .

items.why: Uso de estándares abiertos en co-simulación para mejorar el diseño y validación de sistemas electrónicos complejos.

items.title: Bringing mathematical rigour in the world of hardware – a journey into Formal Verification
items.summary: This interview presents the first steps of Robert Simpson (R.S.), a Maths graduate who found an unexpected, but natural home in Formal Verification (FV) at Axiomise. Drawn by a desire to apply rigorous logic to real-world problems, he shares how abstract mathematical thinking translates into ensuring hardware correctness &8230; Read More The post Bringing mathematical rigour in the world of hardware &8211; a journey into Formal Verification appeared first on SemiWiki .
